articles.title: Hottest day of the year and smoky skies building - WBAY
articles.search_term: ("mercury soars" OR "mercury crosses" OR "temperature soars" OR "record temperature" OR "all-time high" OR "degrees Celsius" OR "maximum temperature" OR "hottest day" OR "temperature crosses 40" OR "temperature crosses 45" OR "temperature likely to rise") West Bengal
articles.full_text:
Updated: Jul. 13, 2026 at 12:09 PM CDT
A dangerous heat wave is moving in, and we’ve declared First Alert Weather Days through tomorrow as heat index values climb to, and above 100 degrees.
